data.content: Implemented terminate-hang fix. Changes: (1) Added sessionAborted flag in terminal-manager so finishSession preserves 'aborted' status instead of overwriting with completed/error. (2) Wired entry.abort to set the flag, preventing take-loop from spawning new iterations after terminate. (3) Spawn agent children with detached:true and use process-group kill so descendants don't survive. (4) SIGKILL fallback checks real process liveness via kill(pid,0). (5) session-connection-manager preserves 'aborted' status on exit event. (6) Added 7 new tests covering abort behavior. All 1965 tests pass, build clean, pushed to main.
